name: Lung Fung Shrimps
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein shrimps. Rinse thoroughly with cold water. Drain and pat dry.
2. Soak the dried Chinese black mushrooms in hot water for 20 minutes. Drain and pat dry. Remove and discard stems. Cut caps into triangular pieces.
3. Cut straw mushrooms in half and white mushrooms into 4 slices.
4. Cut green onion into 2, separating the white bulb from the green stems. Cut green stems into 1-inch pieces.
5. In a deep saucepan, heat oil until it browns a cube of bread in 1 minute. Do not let it smoke. Add shrimps and fry them until pink and curled. Drain and set aside.
6. Deep fry the mushrooms (1 kind at a time) for 15-20 seconds each. Drain and set aside with shrimps.
7. In a wok, heat 2 tablespoons vegetable oil over medium high heat. Add ginger root slices and white onion bulb. Discard any browned ginger or onion.
8. Add chicken stock, cooking wine, salt, sugar, soy sauce, and oyster sauce. Mix thoroughly and bring to a boil.
9. Add shrimps and the 3 kinds of mushrooms. Stir until well-coated with the sauce.
10. Mix corn starch with water. Add to the shrimp mixture and cook for 1 minute.
11. Add sesame oil and white pepper to taste. Spoon onto warm serving platter and sprinkle with green onion slices.
